sources.name: Serenity / 白毛股神
sources.note: AI/semi chokepoints, memory, photonics, data centers

sources.name: 0xWizard / 巫师
sources.note: Speculation cycles, AI equity risk, crypto narratives

sources.name: qinbafrank
sources.note: Macro liquidity, CPI/FOMC, AI ROI, semis

sources.name: 川沐 / Trumoo
sources.note: AI stocks, memory, Korea semis, options tone

sources.name: 猫姐美股交易
sources.note: Rotation, flows, HOOD, tactical market notes

sources.name: unusual_whales
sources.note: Breaking market/policy headlines and options flow

errors.serenity:
ok: false
error:
  code: BROWSER_CONNECT
  message: Browser Bridge extension not connected
  help: |-
    Make sure Chrome/Chromium is open and the OpenCLI extension is enabled.
    If not installed:
      1. Download: https://github.com/jackwener/opencli/releases
      2. Open chrome://extensions → Developer Mode → Load unpacked
  exitCode: 69

errors.trumoo:
ok: false
error:
  code: BROWSER_CONNECT
  message: Failed to start opencli daemon
  help: |-
    Try running manually:
      node /Users/vic/.agent-reach/npm/node_modules/@jackwener/opencli/dist/src/daemon.js
    Make sure port 19825 is available.
  exitCode: 69
